title: Catch and load poultry
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Catch and load poultry demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to catch or pick up poultry

pcs.text: Confirm and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry farm or facility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry farm or facility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm and follow personal hygiene and other biosecurity procedures that apply to entering and working on a poultry farm or facility.

pcs.text: Confirm sheds, flocks and bird numbers to be caught and loaded
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm sheds, flocks and bird numbers to be caught and loaded?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm sheds, flocks and bird numbers to be caught and loaded.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks, and control and/or report risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks, and control and/or report risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks, and control and/or report risks.

pcs.text: Advise other workers of upcoming bird movement as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Advise other workers of upcoming bird movement as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Advise other workers of upcoming bird movement as required.

pcs.text: Select and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for the catching or picking up of poultry
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for the catching or picking up of poultry?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and fit appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) required for the catching or picking up of poultry.

pcs.text: Adjust shed lighting, ventilation and temperature in readiness to catch and/or move poultry according to enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust shed lighting, ventilation and temperature in readiness to catch and/or move poultry according to enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust shed lighting, ventilation and temperature in readiness to catch and/or move poultry according to enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Raise feeders, drinkers, nests and perches as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Raise feeders, drinkers, nests and perches as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Raise feeders, drinkers, nests and perches as required.

pcs.text: Ensure that catching locations, movement pathways and vehicle loading area are safe and clear of obstacles
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure that catching locations, movement pathways and vehicle loading area are safe and clear of obstacles?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure that catching locations, movement pathways and vehicle loading area are safe and clear of obstacles.

pcs.text: Select, clean, prepare and/or set up catching tools and equipment according to age, stock type and production system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, clean, prepare and/or set up catching tools and equipment according to age, stock type and production system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, clean, prepare and/or set up catching tools and equipment according to age, stock type and production system.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to catch or pick up poultry

elements.title: Handle and move poultry

pcs.text: Move birds into catching area or remove birds from cages or crates using safe manual handling, and safe and low stress bird handling techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Move birds into catching area or remove birds from cages or crates using safe manual handling, and safe and low stress bird handling techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move birds into catching area or remove birds from cages or crates using safe manual handling, and safe and low stress bird handling techniques.

pcs.text: Identify birds that are not fit to move, and separate according to enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify birds that are not fit to move, and separate according to enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify birds that are not fit to move, and separate according to enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Catch and/or handle birds being relocated, and place birds in crates or modules or weighing cells according to space or weight requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Catch and/or handle birds being relocated, and place birds in crates or modules or weighing cells according to space or weight requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Catch and/or handle birds being relocated, and place birds in crates or modules or weighing cells according to space or weight requirements.

pcs.text: Check birds regularly and take action to manage temperature and ventilation, and minimise smothering
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check birds regularly and take action to manage temperature and ventilation, and minimise smothering?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check birds regularly and take action to manage temperature and ventilation, and minimise smothering.

pcs.text: Move crates or modules safely and load onto vehicle gently using safe manual handling techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Move crates or modules safely and load onto vehicle gently using safe manual handling techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move crates or modules safely and load onto vehicle gently using safe manual handling techniques.

pcs.text: Complete records and report issues promptly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete records and report issues promptly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete records and report issues promptly.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Handle and move poultry

elements.title: Undertake cleaning and reporting

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks, and control and/or report risks associated with cleaning work areas
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks, and control and/or report risks associated with cleaning work areas?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards, assess risks, and control and/or report risks associated with cleaning work areas.

pcs.text: Select and fit appropriate PPE required for cleaning
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and fit appropriate PPE required for cleaning?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and fit appropriate PPE required for cleaning.

pcs.text: Measure chemicals and prepare cleaning fluids safely according to supplier instructions and enterprise procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure chemicals and prepare cleaning fluids safely according to supplier instructions and enterprise procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure chemicals and prepare cleaning fluids safely according to supplier instructions and enterprise procedures.

pcs.text: Check and prepare cleaning equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and prepare cleaning equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and prepare cleaning equipment.

pcs.text: Clean, sanitise, maintain and store equipment and tools as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, sanitise, maintain and store equipment and tools as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, sanitise, maintain and store equipment and tools as required.

pcs.text: Dispose of waste according to enterprise biosecurity and environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of waste according to enterprise biosecurity and environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of waste according to enterprise biosecurity and environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Complete records and report issues promptly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete records and report issues promptly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete records and report issues promptly.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Undertake cleaning and reporting

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
